3.3. Nano-Encapsulated MTM Targets Cancer Stem Cells (CSCs) Subpopulations in Sarcoma.
Cancer stem cell (CSC) subpopulations are thought to be responsible for tumor main-
tenance, being directly associated with invasion and metastatic dissemination [45]. Rele-
vantly, MTM has demonstrated its potential to eliminate CSC subpopulations in different
types of cancer [12,14,15,17]. CSC-enriched cell culture can be obtained by growing cells
as ﬂoating 3D tumorspheres [34]. Therefore, we tested the ability of the different MTM
formulations to target CSCs by analyzing their anti-proliferative effect in tumorsphere

systems are equally able to decrease the number and the size of T-5H-FC#1 tumorspheres
